subcodes.first_line: O leaf of love! Hearken unto the call of thy Lord from this Prison, that the melodies of the All-Merciful may draw thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ورقه الحب اسمعی ندآء ربک عن شطر هذا السجن لتجذبک نغمات الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @humility; meekness; lowliness
